ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 INF (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 CQC (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 SF (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 GL (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 THM (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles.

ThingDef.label: Lachmann 762 IAR (G3A4)
ThingDef.description: A battle rifle configured for service use with a robust, utilitarian layout. Built around a full-power cartridge and a proven operating system, it emphasizes structural simplicity, consistent handling, and sustained performance in conventional infantry roles. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 INF (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 CQC (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 SF (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 THM (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 IAR (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 SNP (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements.

ThingDef.label: SO-14 Wooden (M1A)
ThingDef.description: A compact variant of a traditional battle rifle platform, adapted for use in confined and urban environments. Its shortened configuration emphasizes maneuverability while retaining the platform’s characteristic power and suitability for close-to-mid range engagements.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V INF (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V CQC (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V SF (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V GL (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V UBS (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a Masterkey shotgun designed to breach doors or breach the chests of apporaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: TAQ V THM (SCAR-H)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon INF (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon CQC (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon SF (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon GL (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon THM (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon IAR (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: FTAC Recon SNP (458 AR-15)
ThingDef.description: A large-bore AR-pattern rifle configured for high-impact performance at short to medium distances. Its design emphasizes force and terminal effect over speed, adapting the familiar AR layout to a heavier, more deliberate style of engagement.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall INF (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall CQC (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall SF (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall GL (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall UBS (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a Masterkey shotgun designed to breach doors or breach the chests of apporaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall THM (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall IAR (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: Cronen Squall SNP (RM227)
ThingDef.description: A next-generation service rifle concept built around a compact layout and unconventional internal geometry. Its design emphasizes reduced overall length, modern materials, and integration with contemporary infantry systems, reflecting a shift toward forward-looking small-arms development rather than incremental refinement.

ThingDef.label: Oden (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden INF (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden CQC (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden SF (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden GL (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden THM (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden IAR (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: Oden (ASh-12)
ThingDef.description: A heavy bullpup rifle chambered for massive subsonic rounds, built to deliver devastating stopping power at close range. Its compact layout keeps it manageable despite its size, though the powerful ammunition produces heavy recoil and limited effective range.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 INF (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 CQC (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 SF (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 GL (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 UBS (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR17 THM (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular heavy service rifle built around a robust operating system and reinforced construction. Its configurable layout supports consistent performance and adaptability across demanding infantry roles and varied combat environments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 IAR (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: SCAR-17 SNP (SCAR-H Tan)
ThingDef.description: A modular battle rifle designed for reliability in harsh desert environments, offering strong stopping power and effective range. Its robust construction and adaptable platform allow it to perform consistently in demanding conditions while supporting a wide range of attachments.

ThingDef.label: TR2 (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 INF (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 CQC (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 SF (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 GL (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 THM (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 IAR (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.

ThingDef.label: TR2 SNP (FN FAL)
ThingDef.description: A classic battle rifle renowned for its widespread service across the world and powerful full-size cartridge. It delivers strong long-range performance and hard-hitting firepower, though its weight and recoil can make sustained fire difficult to control.
